title: Section 18A
content: 1, 2[18A. Punishment for organising of terrorist camps.--[Whoever organises or causes to be organised any camp or camps for imparting training in terrorism shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than five years but which may extend to imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 7, ibid., for Chapter IV (w.e.f. 21-9-2004). 2. Ins. by s. 8, ibid. (w.e.f. 31-12-2008).
